atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's blood pressure was slightly elevated

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The glucose test from a few months ago showed a reading of 300 mg/dL

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A grade 2 systolic ejection murmur was heard on heart auscultation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lung sounds are clear bilaterally

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician is prescribing oxycodone 5 mg every 6-8 hours as needed for pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician is continuing the patient's current metformin 500mg daily for diabetes management

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician is referring the patient to a registered dietitian for dietary counseling

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician is sending the patient to urology for further evaluation and management of the kidney stone

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up in two weeks to assess progress and adjust treatment as needed
